summary: Added read-only explicit L0 inclusion visibility to provider latest-context dry-run JSON summaries. ai_lab.documentation.prompt_context now loads L0 chunk summary JSON records from an L0 store, estimates rough token cost deterministically, deduplicates explicit chunk ids, reports missing chunks as not_found, admits chunks against the L0 budget bucket when --context-window is provided, and emits l0_candidates, l0_included, and l0_dropped in schema_version v1 JSON summaries. scripts/ask_provider.py and scripts/compare_providers.py now support --include-l0 and --l0-store for --print-context-summary --summary-format json. This is read-only summary visibility only; it does not alter rendered context packs or final prompts. Smoke test using create_l0_chunk.py produced valid l0_* JSON output; full suite passed with 224 tests.
